'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 48''' is the forty-eighth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[January 3]], [[1979]]. It reprinted the ''[[Pizzazz]]'' comic strips in black and white.

==Contents==
*"[[A Matter of Monsters!]]"
*"[[Pursuit among the Ruins!]]"
*"Tales of the galaxy: Visitation Part 1"
*"The power of Warlock Part 4: Deathship!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Pildorr, the plunderer from outer space!"
